title: "Library"
description: "A detailed concept index across my AI/ML book collection — which books cover which topic, and on which pages. Reference only; the source PDFs live in my private Drive."
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Sections"
toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .lib-search{ position:sticky; top:0; z-index:10; background:rgba(244,243,250,0.7); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); padding:.6rem .8rem .8rem; border-radius:0 0 16px 16px; }
        .lib-search input{ width:100%; max-width:480px; padding:.55rem .9rem; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.7); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.55); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); border-radius:999px; font:500 14px Inter,sans-serif; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
        .lib-search input:focus{ outline:none; border-color:#4C4A98; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(76,74,152,.12); }
        .lib-count{ font:500 12px Inter,sans-serif; color:#8888a0; margin-left:.6rem; }
        .lib-sec{ margin:1.4rem 0; }
        .lib-sec h2{ font-size:1.15rem; }
        table.lib{ width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:.9rem; margin-top:.3rem; }
        table.lib th{ text-align:left; background:#4C4A98; color:#fff; padding:.4rem .6rem; font-size:.78rem; position:sticky; }
        table.lib td{ border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08); padding:.35rem .6rem; vertical-align:top; }
        table.lib td.bk{ font-weight:600; color:#4C4A98; width:38%; white-space:nowrap; }
        table.lib td.pg{ font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.82rem; color:#444; }
        body.quarto-dark table.lib td{ border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1); color:#d8d8e0; }
        body.quarto-dark table.lib td.bk{ color:#b6b4f0; }
        body.quarto-dark table.lib td.pg{ color:#c9c9d6; }
        body.quarto-dark .lib-search{ background:rgba(19,18,32,0.6); }
        body.quarto-dark .lib-search input{ width:100%; max-width:480px; padding:.55rem .9rem; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.7); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.55); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); border-radius:999px; font:500 14px Inter,sans-serif; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
      </style>
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script>
      (function(){
        function boot(){
          var box=document.getElementById('libq'); if(!box) return;
          var secs=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.lib-sec'));
          var cnt=document.getElementById('libcount');
          box.addEventListener('input',function(){
            var q=box.value.toLowerCase().trim(); var shown=0;
            secs.forEach(function(s){
              var hay=s.getAttribute('data-h');
              var vis=!q||hay.indexOf(q)>-1; s.style.display=vis?'':'none'; if(vis)shown++;
            });
            cnt.textContent=shown+' / '+secs.length+' sections';
          });
        }
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);
        window.addEventListener('load',boot);
      })();
      </script>
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
### 📚 About this library

A cross-index of my AI/ML book collection: for each topic, the books that cover it and the **page numbers** where. Search by topic or book below. *Reference only — the PDFs are in my private Drive, so there are no links.*
:::

```{=html}
<div class="lib-search">
  <input id="libq" type="search" placeholder="🔎 Filter by topic or book name…" autocomplete="off">
  <span class="lib-count" id="libcount"></span>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<h2 id="matrix-inverse-determinant-16-books">Matrix Inverse &amp; Determinant (16 books)</h2>
<table class="lib"><thead><tr><th>Book</th><th>Pages / Concepts</th></tr></thead><tbody>

<tr><td class="bk">Tamoghna Ghosh, Shravan Kumar Belagal Math - Practical Mathematics for AI and Deep Learning</td><td class="pg">Interpretability of linear models</td></tr>
</tbody></table></div>
```
